topStories.title: Dmart recasts strategy as rapid delivery competition intensifies
topStories.summary: DMart has scaled back its e-commerce footprint, exiting underperforming cities to focus on metros as competition intensifies in India’s rapid delivery space. Despite rising pressure from Amazon, Flipkart, Zepto and Swiggy, the retailer is sticking to its low-cost model and non-10-minute delivery approach amid muted earnings performance.

topStories.title: HDFC Bank, HCL Tech among 143 companies to announce earnings this week

topStories.title: Dividends and stock splits: TCS, Dabur, MRF among nearly 100 stocks turning ex-date this week. Do you own any?

Investors must hold shares by record dates to qualify, with several high dividend payouts and multiple corporate actions lined up across sectors through the busy trading week ahead.

topStories.title: Korea’s world-beating stocks are now trading cheaper than ever

Investors remain divided over whether the cheap valuations present a buying opportunity or reflect concerns over the sustainability of the AI-driven memory boom.

topStories.title: Mind Over Money | How Pilates reshaped Juhi Bhatnagar's approach to leadership, investing and motherhood
topStories.summary: Juhi Bhatnagar found that slowing down brought significant clarity and balance. Pilates helped her replace hustle with intention and make better decisions. This practice fosters mental clarity and resilience during demanding periods. Consistency over intensity became her guiding principle for success. Physical and mental balance leads to better leadership and decision-making.

topStories.title: Late-stage cheques go big at $86 million average this year
